title: By developers, for developers
text: Lesli is designed and maintained using high-quality engineering standards and modern development practices.
foot: Focus on building features, not infrastructure, and deliver value continuously.

content.name: Code Generation
content.text: Speed up development with enhanced Rails generators and built-in best practices.

content.name: UI Templates
content.text: Build interfaces faster using ready-to-use components and layout templates.

content.name: Responsive Design
content.text: Create interfaces that work seamlessly across desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.

content.name: Complete Test Coverage
content.text: Automated unit and integration tests help keep your software stable and reliable.

content.name: Modern Stack
content.text: Built on up-to-date tools and frameworks to ensure long-term stability and performance.
